creator: bob@eager.cx
text:
Created attachment 202748
Diffs to port files

Claiming maintainership!

- The port has been cleaned up and improved, as well as updating to 0.79.5
- New MASTER_SITES (old one is dead)
- Removed redundant configure options
- Removed redundant debug options
- Removed redundant post-patches in Makefile
- Added missing dependencies in Makefile
- Simplified the Makefile considerably
- Added user manual under the control of DOCS
- pkg-message now dynamic, pointing to more information
- Added icon and .desktop file to port
- Upstream requires gcc, so USE_GCC now used
- portlint -A does not fail
- Tested on 11.2-RELEASE-i386,11.2-STABLE-amd64, 12.0-RELEASE-amd64,
  and 13.0-CURRENT-amd64

New files:
files/DEVICES.html.in
files/DEVICES.md.in
files/patch-icon-factory.c
files/patch-locale_pt__BR.po
files/patch-locale_ru.po
files/pkg-message.in

Deleted files:
pkg-message
